# Google Gemini

> AI Registry entry [AIR-5](https://linear.app/janusd/issue/AIR-5/google-gemini) — status **Production** as of 2026-05-05. Departments: finance, marketing, office-of-ceo, training.

**Category:** Foundation Model / AI Assistant
**Cost per User/Month:** $19 (Gemini Business)
**Number of Licences:** 12
**Total Monthly Cost:** $228
**Departments:** All

## Overview

Google's flagship multimodal AI assistant, available as consumer product and integrated across Google Workspace. Janus's primary foundation model for general-purpose AI tasks across all departments. Multimodal: text, image, audio, video.

## Capabilities

* Conversational AI with multi-turn context
* Multimodal: text, images, PDFs, audio, video
* Workspace integration (Gmail, Docs, Sheets, Slides, Meet)
* Code generation
* Deep Research mode
* Image generation (Imagen)
* Video generation — best-in-class amongst foundation models in use at Janus
* Canvas — strong collaborative document workflow
* Extensions: Google Search, Maps, YouTube, Flights, Hotels, Workspace

## Operational Use-Case Decisions

*Decided at Andrew Weekly standup, 5 May 2026, by Michael Bruck and Andrew:*

1. **Default for daily and deep research** — Gemini Deep Research explicitly endorsed as the strongest option.
2. **Default for image and video generation** — for PowerPoint slide decks. "image+video generation is best on Gemini."
3. **Canvas workflows** — preferred surface for collaborative document drafting in Workspace.
4. **Split with Claude** — Claude (AIR-10) is default for reasoning, code, harness work, Cowork. Gemini default for research, multimodal generation, Workspace-native tasks.

## Security & Compliance

* Inherits Workspace enterprise compliance (SOC 1/2/3, ISO 27001, GDPR)
* Enterprise plan: conversations not used to train models
* Workspace SSO
* Audit logging

## Relevance to Janus Digital

Most widely deployed AI tool at Janus — 12 licences across all departments. Native Workspace integration makes it lowest-friction AI for non-technical staff. Business plan ensures enterprise data protections.

*Universal deployment across all departments. Core Infrastructure tier.*
